zh: McDermott 核心产品线，90+ 款型号可选
i-2 前节版本和 G-Core 前节版本两大配置
终身免费保修（含变形），业界最强保障
全美国制造，珍贵木材镶嵌工艺精湛
可深度定制：染色、握把材质、木材选择
en: McDermott's core product line with 90+ models available
Two main configurations: i-2 shaft and G-Core shaft
Lifetime warranty including warpage — industry's strongest guarantee
Made in USA with exquisite exotic wood inlay craftsmanship
Highly customizable: stains, wraps, exotic woods, and materials

suitable_for.zh: 各水平段的玩家。G-Core 版本（$445-$1140）适合进阶玩家，i-Shaft 版本（$1275-$2690）适合追求顶级性能的竞技选手。终身保修让它成为'买一根用一辈子'的选择。
suitable_for.en: Players at all skill levels. G-Core versions ($445-$1,140) suit advancing players, while i-Shaft versions ($1,275-$2,690) target competitive players seeking top performance. The lifetime warranty makes it a 'buy once, use forever' choice.

review.zh: G-Series 是 McDermott 的灵魂产品线，也是理解这个品牌的钥匙。与 Predator 和 Mezz 的'几个系列、少量型号'策略不同，McDermott 走的是'一个系列涵盖全价位'的路线——从入门级 $445 的 G201 到旗舰级 $2690 的 M29C，都叫 G-Series。核心差异在于后把的用料和工艺复杂度。终身保修是真正的杀手锏：如果你的杆弯了，寄回去免费换新，这在其他品牌是不可想象的。G-Core 版本性价比极高，推荐预算 $500-800 区间的玩家重点考虑。
review.en: The G-Series is McDermott's soul product line and the key to understanding this brand. Unlike Predator and Mezz's 'few series, limited models' strategy, McDermott takes a 'one series covering all price points' approach — from the entry-level $445 G201 to the flagship $2,690 M29C, all under G-Series. The core difference lies in butt materials and craftsmanship complexity. The lifetime warranty is the true killer feature: if your cue warps, send it back for a free replacement — unthinkable with other brands. The G-Core versions offer exceptional value, highly recommended for players in the $500-800 budget range.
